nasb.text: Your holy cities have become a wilderness, Zion has become a wilderness, Jerusalem a desolation.

esv.text: Your holy cities have become a wilderness; Zion has become a wilderness, Jerusalem a desolation.

cnv.text: 你的聖城變了曠野， 錫安成了曠野， 耶路撒冷成了荒場。

ccb.text: 你的众圣城已沦为荒场， 甚至锡安已沦为荒场， 耶路撒冷已沦为废墟。

csbs.text: 你的圣城变成了旷野， 锡安变成了旷野， 耶路撒冷变成了荒凉之地。
